topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Microcontrollers. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Embedded Systems Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Microcontrollers is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Microcontrollers in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Microcontrollers snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Microcontrollers?
How does Microcontrollers handle memory management?
